user.title: Blueprint Toolkit
user.description: Set up the integration. Click Submit to install the bundled blueprints and rendered docs into your config directory.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Blueprint Toolkit can be configured.

data_description.cli_symlink_dir: Bundled CLI scripts (zwave_network_info.py) will be symlinked into this directory. Path must be writable by Home Assistant. On HAOS / Supervised, the integration runs in its own container -- use a shared-mount path like /config (paths like /root resolve inside HA's container, not the SSH add-on). Leave empty to skip.

install_conflicts.title: Install conflicts
install_conflicts.description: The integration found existing files or symlinks at one or more destinations it wants to install to. Click Submit to remove and replace them, or Ignore if you'd like to keep what's there.

confirm.title: Overwrite conflicting paths?

install_failure.title: Install failure
install_failure.description: The integration could not complete its install. Fix the underlying problem on disk, then click Submit to retry.

confirm.title: Retry install?

edw_entity_id_drift.title: Entity ID drift: {entity_id}
edw_entity_id_drift.description: Entity `{entity_id}` has drifted from its default ID `{default_entity_id}`. Click Submit to rename it back to the default.

confirm.title: Rename entity?
confirm.description:
Rename `{entity_id}` to `{default_entity_id}`.

Click Submit to apply.

edw_entity_name_drift.title: Entity name drift: {entity_id}
edw_entity_name_drift.description: Entity `{entity_id}` has a custom friendly name `{current_name}`; the default is `{default_name}`. Click Submit to reset to the default.

confirm.title: Reset entity name?
confirm.description:
Reset friendly name on `{entity_id}` from `{current_name}` to `{default_name}`.

Click Submit to apply.

dw_disabled_diagnostic_entity.title: Disabled diagnostic entity: {entity_id}
dw_disabled_diagnostic_entity.description: Entity `{entity_id}` is disabled but the device watchdog needs it for monitoring. Click Submit to re-enable.

confirm.title: Re-enable entity?
confirm.description:
Set `disabled_by=None` on `{entity_id}`.

Click Submit to apply.
